title: Platform Requirements and Diagnostics

use_cases.name: Check Platform Requirements
use_cases.description: Verifies PHP/extension versions match installed package requirements

use_cases.name: Diagnose Environment
use_cases.description: Runs a comprehensive system health check to identify common Composer errors
sub_checks: checkPubKeys – verifies tags/dev public keys (phar only)
checkVersion – checks for latest Composer version
checkComposerAudit – audits Composer own dependencies for vulnerabilities
checkPlatform – verifies required PHP extensions (json, phar, filter, hash, iconv/mbstring, openssl, zlib) and ini settings
checkGit – validates git color.ui and version >= 2.24
checkComposerRepo – connectivity to additional composer repos in config
getGithubRateLimit – GitHub API rate limit check

supporting_components.name: PlatformRepository
supporting_components.role: Provides a virtual repository of PHP runtime packages (php, php-64bit, php-debug, php-zts, php-ipv6, ext-*, lib-*, composer, composer-plugin-api, composer-runtime-api, hhvm)
key_methods: initialize() – scans runtime extensions and libraries, builds package list
addPackage(PackageInterface) – adds CompletePackage, respects config.platform overrides
addLibrary(libraries, name, version, ...) – creates lib-{name} CompletePackage with provides/replaces
addDisabledPackage(package) – marks package disabled via config.platform false
getPlatformPhpVersion(): ?string – static, returns last seen config.platform.php
search(query, mode, type): array – suppresses SEARCH_VENDOR mode
supporting_components.overrides_support: config.platform array; false disables extension; string overrides version
supporting_components.library_detection: curl, openssl, pcre, libxml, gd, intl, zip, zlib, bz2, mbstring, imagick, mongodb, pgsql, sqlite3, sodium, yaml, ldap, amqp, memcached, rdkafka, ssh2, xsl, mysqlnd/pdo_mysql, date, fileinfo, gmp, iconv

key_relationships: CheckPlatformReqsCommand uses PlatformRepository (adds to InstalledRepository for constraint matching)
DiagnoseCommand instantiates PlatformRepository to read PHP version
DiagnoseCommand uses ConfigValidator, HttpDownloader, ProcessExecutor, Auditor, Versions, Git, ProxyManager
StatusCommand uses VersionGuesser for version drift detection
use_case_extensions_includes: Check Platform Requirements <<include>> Read lock file (--lock flag)
Check Platform Requirements <<include>> Filter dev packages (--no-dev flag)
Check Platform Requirements <<extend>> Output as JSON (--format json)
Diagnose Environment <<extend>> Check Composer version (phar only)
Show Local Package Status <<extend>> Show verbose file diff (--verbose)
important_notes: PlatformRepository ignores config.platform when used by CheckPlatformReqsCommand (passes [] overrides) to reflect real runtime. DiagnoseCommand uses platformOverrides from config. StatusCommand exit code is bitwise sum of 1+2+4. All three commands extend BaseCommand from Symfony Console.
